target_idiom: แก้วลืมคอน
source_meaning: person sent on an errand who fails to return even after a long time
target_meaning: A person who forgets his home or family in a rural area after living in an urban area.
to befriend; to be friendly (to); to be on good terms (with); to have good relations (with); to be at peace (with).

target_idiom: เล็กพริกขี้หนู
source_meaning: "a marten that hunts tigers"; a David before a Goliath
target_meaning: small, tiny, or young, but surprisingly able, clever, wise, smart, harsh, severe, poisonous, or capable of causing widespread or serious destruction or impact.

target_idiom: วัวหายล้อมคอก
source_meaning: "to wave after the train has left"; to be affected by
target_meaning: to close the stable door after the horse has bolted.

target_idiom: สาธารณรัฐกล้วย
สิบปากว่าไม่เท่าตาเห็น
source_meaning: alternative form of 안 봐도 비디오 (an bwado bidio, “for something to be obvious”)
to turn out to be useful; to prove its worth
target_meaning: to show one's true nature; to show one's true colors.

source_meaning: to try and fall asleep; to lull oneself to sleep
target_meaning: to wake up or force oneself to wake up, especially when it is the time that one should sleep or it is so early or earlier than usual.
